what is it about?

Logically speaking, there are countless vivid examples of how the operation of putting PVE materials in PVP is. It is marked that there is not a prize for participation but a prize for victory. If you don't win, you will get 25 cards and 10 tokens. It is even more amazing that you can empty until you swipe 5,000 tokens.

Therefore, we call on players who are also disgusted with this activity to do PVP mutual brushing. The operation is to add a mutual brush after the name. When they match each other, they will send this [hi of the secret guard] expression at the beginning to confirm that both sides want to brush each other. Play cards casually. If one side wins the first hand, make an appointment to let the other person win (maybe the first hand can be decided by the first hand).
